response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of professional C++ development experience on Windows platform required for the role. While they have C/C++ experience from National Instruments (2014–2015), it is limited to 7 months and does not meet the seniority or duration criteria. Their domain expertise is also not aligned with capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income systems.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship and testing expertise (TDD, CI/CD, Pairing)
Diverse technical stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to lead and mentor teams (Altom Consulting, RIDE Capital)
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience on Windows platform (only 7 months, outdated)
No direct experience in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income systems
Career gap of over a year with no relevant financial services or C++ work

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise in capital markets/fixed income
